calendar.matters:
Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Off Calendar

Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Continued To Jan-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number 291535 (Estate of Glenn C. Aguirre).

Appearances: Judy Carver appeared by telephone for Nicole Maher. Don Potts appeared by telephone for Nicole Maher. Charles Triay for Arlene Lacagnina and Irene Russell.

The Court stated that both matters had similar issues and that the matters would be consolidated for trial purposes only with case number 290341 being the lead case, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mr. Triay informed the Court that mediation was scheduled for December 3, 2008. All matters were continued to January 6, 2009 for status on mediation.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Mendoza.

Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Continued To Nov-18-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Sep-24-2008 Continued To Oct-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dan Pott appeared by telephone for Nicole Maher (Respondent). Charles Triay for Arlene Lacagnina.

The Court stated that a similar matter was to be heard on October 14, 2008. Mr. Triay stated that he filed a will contest in that proceeding and that they were working on consolidating the matters. In addition, he informed the Court that discovery still needed to be completed. The matter was continued to October 14, 2008 to be heard with the related matter.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico.

Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Continued To Sep-24-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Continued To Jun-23-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Triay for Petitioner. Matthew Jaime appeared by telephone for Nicole Maher (Respondent).

Mr. Triay reported that the parties had exchanged written interrogatories, that the first round of supboenas had gone out and that the documents were received, and that the depositions were to take place in 3 weeks. In addition, he suggested that the matter be set for further status to allow discovery to be completed. Mr. Jaime agreed with Mr. Triay. The matter was continued to June 23, 2008 at 10:30 a.m. for status on the trust contest.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Letora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.

Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Continued To Feb-25-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Apperanaces: Charkes Triay for petitioner. Rick Schneider (by Court Call) for Nicole Maher, respondent.

Mr. Triay reported that a Response has been filed to the Contest and he has started discovery. He requested for a four months continuance. Mr. Schneider agreed to the continuance. Value of the trust discussed. Court questioned if mediation is appropriate. Mr. Triay would like to wait until discovery is completed before mediation. Matter is continued to 2/25/08 at 10:30am for status.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Contest Of Second Amendment And Restatement Of Trust Dated November 30, 2005
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Continued To Oct-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Thie matter is not properly set on the calendar. Court did not know how it got set on the calendar. Matter is continued to 10/30 for further status.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Rhonda Fung CSR# 4819. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
